Tests and build script for recognizer components in the Pebble firmware, including state and event handling.


## Files
- **[test_recognizer.c](test_recognizer.c.md)**: Tests for the recognizer component in the Pebble firmware, including state transitions and event handling.
- **[test_recognizer_impl.c](test_recognizer_impl.c.md)**: Tests for the implementation of a touch event recognizer in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_recognizer_impl.h](test_recognizer_impl.h.md)**: Header file for testing recognizer implementation, including creation, destruction, and state management.
- **[test_recognizer_manager.c](test_recognizer_manager.c.md)**: Tests for the recognizer manager in the Pebble firmware, including setup, teardown, and various recognizer state transitions.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling and testing recognizer components in the Pebble firmware.
